systemMessage: Always refer to CLAUDE.md for operating rules and docs/architecture.md for the file map and state schema before answering. You are an expert vanilla JS developer. Fix root causes, not symptoms.

slashCommands.name: review
slashCommands.description: Review current file against CLAUDE.md standards
slashCommands.prompt: Review this file against the coding standards in CLAUDE.md. List issues with simplicity, safety, or correctness.

slashCommands.name: sprint
slashCommands.prompt: Read SPRINTS.md and CHANGELOG.md. Tell me what sprint is active, what is in dev, and what is next.
